context.author: makowskyy2
context.orig:
Panowie mam dwie sprawy:
1. normalni uzytkownicy nie moga wysylac ssow i innych obrazow na chacie?
2. Który luk bedzie lepszy, arcana 65lvl czy immo 80lvl
context.en:
Gentlemen, I have two issues:
1. normal users can't send sss and other images in the chat?
2. Which hatch will be better, arcana 65lvl or immo 80lvl
context.pt:
Senhores, tenho dois problemas:
1. usuários normais não podem enviar sss e outras imagens no chat?
2. Qual escotilha será melhor, arcana 65lvl ou immo 80lvl

context.author: rayner.1986

context.author: kraju
context.orig: jak masz arcana 65 lvl to git ale jeśli masz immo 80 lvl to shadow bow better oczywiscie do zwyklego clear bo na boss rush arcane 65 better
context.en: if you have arcana lvl 65 then it's fine but if you have immo lvl 80 then shadow bow better of course to regular clear because for boss rush arcane 65 better
